module.name: no-map-set-mutation
module.description: Disallow direct Map and Set mutation methods; rebuild collections instead of mutating them in place.

scenarios.name: should allow non-mutating Map lookups
scenarios.given: a typed Map instance that calls .get(...)
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the call expression

scenarios.name: should allow custom objects with set methods
scenarios.given: a non-Map object type that happens to expose a set(...) method
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the call expression

scenarios.name: should disallow Map set mutations
scenarios.given: a typed Map instance that calls .set(...)
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the call expression

scenarios.name: should disallow Set add mutations
scenarios.given: a typed Set instance that calls .add(...)
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the call expression
